name: rd-station-marketing
description: Reads and writes RD Station Marketing platform contacts, segmentation contacts, analytics, contact fields, product catalog feeds, and workflows.

risk.read: external RD Station Marketing API read of contact, campaign, analytics, field, workflow, and catalog-feed data
risk.write: creates, updates, and deletes RD Station Marketing contacts, contact fields, and catalog feeds; mutates contact funnels, tags, and workflow membership
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
